qa_pairs.question: What are the limitations for Primary Investigators (PIs) regarding cloud projects and resource quotas?
qa_pairs.answer: A Primary Investigator (PI) may own up to 3 projects, but the sum of all project quotas must be within the RAS allocation limits. PIs may also have both compute and persistent cloud RAS allocations.

qa_pairs.question: Where can a user find instructions to manually create their first virtual machine on the cloud infrastructure?
qa_pairs.answer: The cloud quick start guide describes how to manually create your first VM.

qa_pairs.question: What other resources should users consult when beginning to create virtual machines on the cloud infrastructure?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should review the Cloud Technical Glossary to learn definitions of common topics and consider cloud storage options best suited to their use case.
